raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge from a gym membership-esque company called XXXX that was charged to me on XX/XX/XXXX, which refused to refund me after I canceled my membership and they charged me for an additional month. XXXX uses a credit based system where you pay monthly for credits that must be used that same month or else they expire. Needless to say, I was charged for an extra month of credits that have since expired. I did not use a single credit. I filed a dispute with Citi, the bank of the credit card I purchased it XXXX and they denied my chargeback request on XX/XX/XXXX saying the return policy/cancelation process was not followed. I was mere hours late on requesting a refund the charge had JUST hit my account and the services are not even accessible to me any longer, I paid for a service that would have never been made available to me.
